steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content:
Similar triangles have corresponding side lengths in the same ratio as their perimeters. The scale factor from triangle $TUV$ to triangle $XYZ$ is
$$\frac{352}{44}=8$$

steps.title: Scale the side length
steps.content:
Since side $TU$ corresponds to side $XY$, multiply the length of $TU$ by the scale factor.
$$16(8)=128$$
The answer is D.
